pastPerformance:
MarketEdge is a social and digital enterprise that helps mission-driven organizations close the gap between insight and impact. We combine three integrated capabilities that most firms only deliver in pieces: Advanced Analytics that produce decision-ready market intelligence, political economy analysis, and investment pipelines; Shared Value Partnerships that align market incentives with development goals to unlock durable public-private collaboration; and Capability Strengthening through hands-on, inductive learning that equips teams to drive change in their own organizations.
What sets us apart is PartnerAI, our proprietary AI platform deployed across 100% of our projects. PartnerAI accelerates synthesis, runs stakeholder simulations, and automates routine tasks, allowing senior practitioners to focus on strategy and relationships and delivering results faster and at roughly half the cost of traditional consulting.
Our track record over the past three years includes more than $10M in catalyzed funding, 200+ partnerships facilitated, 1,054 stakeholders engaged, 142 analytical products delivered, and work across 40+ countries with clients including FCDO, USAID, WWF, World Vision, DAI, Palladium, and the U.S. Department of State. We don't just advise. We build alongside our clients to deliver lasting systems change.
keyPersonnel: 3 senior experts, roster of specialized staff and surge support
